sql_array: CREATE TABLE Books (id VARCHAR PRIMARY KEY, title VARCHAR, publish_date TIMESTAMP, price DOUBLE);
INSERT INTO Books VALUES ('http://example/book1', 'SQL Basics', TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00', 29.99);
INSERT INTO Books VALUES ('http://example/book2', 'Advanced SQL', TIMESTAMP '2022-05-01 00:00:00', 39.99);
INSERT INTO Books VALUES (NULL, 'Untitled', TIMESTAMP NULL, NULL);
SELECT DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL('SELECT * WHERE {?s ?p ?o}','http://example/bookStore', 10) AS result, price / 2 AS discounted_price FROM Books WHERE price IS NOT NULL;

SELECT COUNT(*), AVG(price) AS average_price FROM (SELECT price, DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL('SELECT * WHERE {?s ?p ?o}','http://example/bookStore', 10) FROM Books WHERE publish_date > TIMESTAMP '2021-01-01 00:00:00') AS sub_query GROUP BY publish_date;
SELECT title FROM Books WHERE price / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Books WHERE publish_date IS NOT NULL) > 5;
SELECT id FROM Books WHERE title LIKE '%' || DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL('SELECT ?title WHERE {?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title> ?title}', 'http://example/bookStore', 5) || '%' ESCAPE '' ;
SELECT DISTINCT title FROM Books WHERE price IS NOT NULL HAVING AVG(price) > 30.0;

SELECT title, p.price, DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL('SELECT ?author WHERE {<http://example/book1> <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/author> ?author}', 'http://example/bookStore', 5) FROM Books p WHERE price IS NULL OR price < 40.0;
SELECT title, publish_date, price / NULL AS price_divided FROM Books;

SELECT title AS book_title, DB.DBA.SPARQL_EVAL('SELECT ?title WHERE {?s <http://purl.org/dc/elements/1.1/title> ?title}', 'http://example/bookStore', 5) AS sparql_title FROM Books WHERE id IN (SELECT NULL);
